options.command: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec oxlint --config root-oxlintrc.json package.json project.json nx.json tsconfig.base.json packages --quiet

commands: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-fast

metadata.description: Low-level architecture scanner. The public npm arch:scan script is a compatibility alias to workspace:policy-architecture.
Explicit mutation-pressure architecture gate. Only workspace:policy-proof-pressure invokes this target.

commands: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:arch:scan

metadata.description: Nx-owned public architecture policy gate; wraps workspace:arch:scan so npm arch:scan can remain a compatibility alias.

commands: node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-architecture
node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:arch:mutation
node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:lint
node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run attune-nx:typecheck
node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run attuned-discovery:typecheck
node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:source-bom-check
node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-architecture
node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-fast
node scripts/codex/pnpm.mjs exec nx run workspace:policy-proof-pressure
